executives.name: Christophe Fouquet
executives.background: Christophe Fouquet was appointed as President and Chief Executive Officer in April 2024. He joined ASML in 2008 and has held several leadership positions, including Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer. He has been a member of the Board of Management since 2018.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Management

executives.name: Roger Dassen
executives.background: Roger Dassen was appointed as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in 2018. Before joining ASML, he was the CEO of Deloitte Netherlands and served as a member of the Global Board of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu Limited.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Wayne Allan
executives.background: Wayne Allan was appointed as Executive Vice President and Chief Strategic Sourcing & Procurement Officer in 2023. He joined ASML in 2018 and previously held senior management positions at Micron Technology.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Strategic Sourcing & Procurement Officer

executives.name: Jim Koonmen
executives.background: Jim Koonmen was appointed as Executive Vice President and Chief Customer Officer in 2024. He joined ASML in 2007 through the acquisition of BRION and has held various leadership roles, including CEO of Cymer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Customer Officer

board_of_directors.name: Nils Andersen
board_of_directors.background: Nils Andersen was appointed to the Supervisory Board in 2023 and became Chairman in 2024. He is the former CEO of A.P. Moller-Maersk and Carlsberg.

board_of_directors.name: Jack de Kreij
board_of_directors.background: Jack de Kreij was appointed to the Supervisory Board in 2024. He is the former CFO and member of the Executive Board of Vopak.

tenure_dates.role: Vice Chairman of the Supervisory Board

board_of_directors.name: Annet Aris
board_of_directors.background: Annet Aris was appointed to the Supervisory Board in 2019. She is a Senior Affiliate Professor of Strategy at INSEAD.

board_of_directors.name: Birgit Conix
board_of_directors.background: Birgit Conix was appointed to the Supervisory Board in 2021. She is the former CFO of TUI AG and Belgacom.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Durcan
board_of_directors.background: Mark Durcan was appointed to the Supervisory Board in 2020. He is the former CEO of Micron Technology.

sources.source_description: ASML Official Website - Management Board and Supervisory Board Profiles
